#SecClinton: We will continue to advocate for religious freedom. This is a bedrock priority of our foreign policy. http://t.co/2c1fX7GE
#SecClinton: All faiths everywhere have a stake in defending and expanding religious freedom. http://t.co/2c1fX7GE #IRF11
#SecClinton: Everyone has the right to freedom of thought, conscience, and religion. http://t.co/2c1fX7GE #IRF11

.@StateDept unveils format and interface upgrades for 2011 International Religious Freedom Reports. http://t.co/DyRKfKDC #IRF2011
Stay tuned for a transcript of #SecClinton's remarks on international religious freedom. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF20111
#SecClinton: The United States will always stand for religious freedom for all people, everywhere. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011
#SecClinton: The religious life of our nation is vibrant, alive & possible b/c of our citizens’ capacity for tolerance & respect. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: 2012 Hours Against Hate has elicited commitments from people to spend thousands of hrs walking in someone else’s shoes #IRF2011
#SecClinton: In the Obama Administration, we’ve elevated religious freedom as a diplomatic priority. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011
#SecClinton: As we look to the future, the U.S. will continue to advocate for religious freedom. This is a foreign policy priority. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: In #Egypt, President Morsi has said clearly & repeatedly that he intends to be the president of all Egyptians. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: Studies show it is the absence of religious freedom that is correlated with religious conflict and violent extremism. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: Genuine democracies use principles to guide power, and to protect the rights of citizens equally. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011
#SecClinton: The liberty democracy provides doesn't include liberty to do violence to the equality of all citizens before the law. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: Whether secular or religious, governments have solemn obligations to protect the human rights of all citizens. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: When people of all religions can practice freely, it creates environment in which everyone’s freedom is more secure. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: Every time people choose tolerance and respect over fear and animosity, they strengthen human rights. #IRF2011
#SecClinton on religious freedom: Because this is an issue that inflames emotions, it can be hard to talk about it constructively. #IRF2011
#SecClinton on religious freedom: Like all human rights, they are our birthright. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011
#SecClinton: In the harshest places, certain religions are banned completely, and a believer can be sentenced to death. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: Several countries with diverse faith communities are now in the process of navigating transitions toward democracy. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: New technologies have given repressive governments additional tools for cracking down on religious expression. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: More than a billion people live under governments that systematically suppress religious freedom. http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011
#SecClinton: For U.S., religious freedom is a constitutional value, a strategic national interest & a foreign policy priority. #IRF2011
#SecClinton: "Everyone has the right to freedom of thought, conscience, and religion." http://t.co/UKm9plIx #IRF2011

#SecClinton at #2012GDF: Through this forum we are asking for your help, your ideas, and your input. | Follow @GPIatState for more.
#SecClinton: We are well aware that our diversity is one of our greatest assets in the 21st century. #2012GDF
#SecClinton: The United States has always benefitted from the dynamism that diasporas have brought to our shores. #2012GDF
#SecClinton: Our efforts on #Syria are enhanced by members of the Syrian diaspora. #2012GDF
#SecClinton: We are working to further a transition that brings the people of #Syria together, to avoid sectarian conflict. #2012GDF
#SecClinton: The Syrian diaspora is acting as a link between the international community and opposition on the ground. #Syria #2012GDF
#SecClinton at #2012GDF: I recognize the efforts of the Syrian diaspora to shine a light on what is going on in #Syria.
#SecClinton at #2012GDF: "We want to help people around the world lift themselves out of poverty."
#SecClinton: "We're going to find the best ideas and help them grow into successful businesses." @GPIatState #2012GDF
#SecClinton: #Diaspora communities not only help solve problems and create opportunities in countries of origin, but also in U.S. #2012GDF
#SecClinton: I thank @KrisAtState, the @GPIatState team, @USAID, and others for organizing #2012GDF. Watch live now on http://t.co/UKm9plIx.

Read about how the U.S. continues to help #Haiti work toward economic and social stability: http://t.co/7rj8qJYr
#SecClinton: We look forward to a future where every Haitian has a chance to live up to his/her potential in the country they love. #Haiti
#SecClinton: U.S. can be helpful but what's really important is building capacity of  government and society in #Haiti. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton on #Haiti: Country ownership, country priorities, country agenda setting is absolutely essential. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton: Prime Minister Lamothe and I discussed the importance of the upcoming elections in #Haiti. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton on #Haiti: In the infrastructure sector, we've removed more than two million cubic meters of rubble. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton: We're working with the Inter-American Development Bank and others on  programs to stop cholera in #Haiti. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton: Working with #Haiti and its partners, we have succeeded in reducing fatality rate of cholera epidemic from 9% to just over 1%.
#SecClinton: Through our @FeedtheFuture Initiative, we've helped nearly 10,000 farmers in #Haiti. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton: #Haiti is working very hard to overcome extreme poverty and the devastating natural disaster. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton on #Haiti: We have focused our work in agriculture, healthcare, infrastructure, and the rule of law. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton: When I came into office as #SecState, I made #Haiti a foreign policy priority. http://t.co/0szRKgQj
#SecClinton remarks with Haitian Prime Minister Laurent Lamothe after their meeting in Washington, DC today: http://t.co/0szRKgQj

Stay tuned for a transcript of #SecClinton's remarks on preventing genocide @HolocaustMuseum at http://t.co/UKm9plIx. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: One has to believe that together we can overcome these challenges. There will, slowly, inexorably, be progress. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We have seen evil and hatred overcome. In @HolocaustMuseum's tragic history, we also see the stories of heroes. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: Whatever form atrocities take, we must be committed to preventing, ending these actions that dehumanize humanity. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: Not every mass killing is announced, there are slow motion conflicts that happen every day. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: If it were easy, we wouldn't have to have Holocaust Museums and Prevention Boards. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: As Assad regime continues bloody assault on its people, they have found support from #Iran, #Russia, #China. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: How do we ensure we don't make a bad situation worse? We must approach this with humility and understanding. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We want to expand our circle of partners to prevent genocide. It starts with a robust diplomatic effort. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We want to make clear that those who commit these atrocities will be held accountable. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We are enhancing our civilian surge capacity to defuse potentially violent situations. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: #Women are often the first to know when communities are in danger. #Women are also the first to suffer. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: Genocide doesn't happen overnight. It's preceded by organized propaganda campaigns. Messages trickle down. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We are putting new emphasis on prevention & we are seeking to expand range of partners contributing to this cause. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We continue to work with international partners to end ongoing violence in #Syria and usher in a democratic gov't. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: These crimes undermine stability in countries and across regions. They spark crises, stunt growth for generations. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: We've seen cost of inaction. In #Rwanda, 800,000 people out of a country of 7 million died. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: Despite all we have accomplished in the last 70 years, “Never again” remains an unmet, urgent goal. #EndGenocide
#SecClinton: When we hear Holocaust glorification, we need to make clear that bigotry won't be tolerated. http://t.co/bleQL98v #EndGenocide
Live Now! #SecClinton delivers keynote @HolocaustMuseum Symposium on Genocide Prevention. http://t.co/bleQL98v

#SecClinton: Getting the gender-sensitive data we need will help act as a blueprint for building a better future for us all. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Improving the rights and status of women is not simply a matter of human dignity. It is also essential to prosperity, security.
#SecClinton: Investing in collecting and analyzing data on #women can exponentially increase those benefits. http://t.co/ROZJsavp #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Investing in #women has a multiplying effect that brings about positive results for entire societies. http://t.co/ROZJsavp
#SecClinton: We have to push not only for more data but better data -- data that illuminates challenges, opportunities women and girls face.
#SecClinton: Data not only measures progress, it inspires it. As we have learned in this country, what gets measured gets done. #GenderGap
#SecClinton remarks on 'Evidence and Impact: Closing the Gender Data Gap' http://t.co/ROZJsavp | #GenderGap | #GenderData

#SecClinton: We've put #women at the heart of our foreign policy priorities. It's the right thing to do, the smart thing to do. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Improving rights and status of #women is not simply a matter of human dignity, it is essential to shared prosperity, security.
#SecClinton: Data 2X will develop curriculum standards to ensure data producers and users train in gender-sensitive techniques. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: I'm pleased to announce a new initiative -- Data 2X, a symbol of the power #women have to multiply progress. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: We have to push for not just more data, but better data. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap #GenderData
#SecClinton: Investing in #women has a multiplying effect that brings about positive results for entire societies. #GenderGap #GenderData
#SecClinton: Today, @WorldBank #JimKim launched an important addition to our toolkit, a #genderdata portal. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap
#SecClinton: The good news is, we know more than we used to. For a long time, information about #women was hiding in plain sight. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Once you start measuring problems, people take action to fix them. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap #GenderData
#SecClinton: Data not only measure progress, they inspire it. As we have learned in this country, what gets measured gets done. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Lack of data keeps those of us looking to close the #gendergap from getting the most out of investments. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5
#SecClinton: For too many countries, we lack reliable, regular data on even the basic facts about the lives of #women and girls. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: The data already provides  evidence that demonstrates links between greater gender equality and increased prosperity, security.
#SecClinton: If we are serious about narrowing the #GenderGap, then we must get serious about gathering and analyzing the data. #GenderData
#SecClinton: We keep statistics on everything we care about -- from RBIs to ROI. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap #GenderData
#SecClinton: Concrete action is possible when we understand the scope and scale of a problem. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap #GenderData
#SecClinton: Data only becomes valuable when we organize it and put it to work. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap
#SecClinton: Some measures suggest the world created as much as 1.8 zettabytes of data last year. http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 #GenderGap
#SecClinton: #Twitter users generate 340 million tweets daily. Some of you are tweeting right now. Remember, it's hashtag #GenderGap.
#SecClinton: Massive amounts of information are being shared faster, through more channels, and reaching more people than ever. #GenderGap
#SecClinton: We are living in the midst of a data revolution.  http://t.co/SqGfPaP5 | #GenderGap | #GenderData
